summary: iter194 FM-Upgrade 1 (TimelineEvent primitive) comprehensive testing complete. All 21 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Activity Timeline panel fully verified with live feed, category chips, FSMA 204 mock-recall (1ms performance), and all event types displaying correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All iter194 Timeline features implemented correctly and working
Timeline emit is admin-gated and fail-soft (exceptions swallowed)
Idempotency via idempotency_key works correctly (duplicate returns event_id=None)
CTE events validate KDEs and add _kde_warning if missing but still emit
Recall performance is excellent: 1-2ms (well under 2000ms target)
All 6 hot routes wired correctly: IRD order.placed, PO drafted/approved, lot.received, standup.sent, feature_flag.toggled
Auto-minted TLCs in lot.received events for FSMA 204 traceability
Frontend Activity Timeline panel has live 8s refresh, category chips, recall input with mode select
seed_data_creation: Created test timeline events during testing (po.drafted, po.approved, lot.received, order.placed, standup.sent, feature_flag.toggled)
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter194 fully tested. FM-Upgrade 1 TimelineEvent primitive is complete. Key features: (1) Timeline emit at POST /api/timeline/emit (admin-gated, fail-soft, idempotent). (2) Timeline query at POST /api/timeline/query with entity_id/event_types/actor_id filters. (3) Timeline recent at GET /api/timeline/recent?limit=N&kind=. (4) FSMA 204 mock-recall at GET /api/timeline/recall?tlc=|lot_id=|pack_id=|batch_id= - returns forward+backward trace in <2ms. (5) Cycle-time at GET /api/timeline/cycle-time?entity_id=&from_type=&to_type=. (6) Hot routes wired: IRD order.placed (FIXED - was missing), PO drafted/approved, lot.received (with auto-minted TLC), standup.sent, feature_flag.toggled. (7) Frontend Activity Timeline panel at sidebar → Admin & System → 'Activity Timeline · Recall' with testids: activity-timeline-root, recall-run, recall-result, recall-error, category-chips, chip-{all|lot|po|batch|pack|order|label|echo}, activity-feed, event-{type}, auto-refresh-toggle. MOCKED: FCM/APNs push, Twilio SMS, Resend emails (all queued until keys arrive).
